items.title: prompts.chat
items.summary: f.k.a. Awesome ChatGPT Prompts. Share, discover, and collect prompts from the community. Free and open source — self-host for your organization with complete privacy.

items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，prompts.chat这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: LLMs-from-scratch
items.summary: Implement a ChatGPT-like LLM in PyTorch from scratch, step by step
items.summary_cn: 在PyTorch中从头开始逐步实现类似ChatGPT的LLM
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: ClinHallu: A Benchmark for Diagnosing Stage-Wise Hallucinations in Medical MLLM Reasoning
items.title_cn: ClinHallu ：诊断医学MLM推理中阶段性幻觉的基准
items.summary: Building trustworthy medical multimodal large language models (MLLMs) is critical for reliable clinical decision support. Existing medical hallucination benchmarks mainly focus on data collection, but often ignore where hallucinations originate within the reasoning process. We find that hallucinatio...
items.summary_cn: 建立值得信赖的医学多模式大语言模型（ MLLM ）对于可靠的临床决策支持至关重要。现有的医学幻觉基准主要集中在数据收集上，但往往忽略了推理过程中幻觉的起源。我们发现这种幻觉...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Learning Coordinated Preference for Multi-Objective Multi-Agent Reinforcement Learning
items.title_cn: 多目标多Agent强化学习的学习协调偏好
items.summary: Cooperative multi-objective multi-agent reinforcement learning (MOMARL) models team decision making under multiple, potentially conflicting objectives. In this setting, conflicts arise not only across objectives but also across agents with different observations, roles, and contributions. We propose...
items.summary_cn: 协作多目标多智能体强化学习（ MOMARL ）在多个潜在冲突的目标下对团队决策进行建模。在这种情况下，冲突不仅发生在目标之间，也发生在具有不同观察、角色和贡献的客服代表之间。我们建议...
items.comment: 新模型来了，是骡子是马拉出来遛遛，别光看宣传看实测。

items.title: Flood and Harvest: The Provable Necessity of Trivia for Generating Valuable Mathematics via the Lens of Language Generation in the Limit
items.title_cn: 洪水与收获：通过语言生成镜头在极限中生成有价值数学的琐事的可证明必要性
items.summary: AI systems coupled to proof assistants now generate formal mathematics at scale, and the gap between what a checker can verify and what a mathematician would value has become the binding constraint. We model the generation of valuable mathematics as nested language generation in the limit: a verifia...
items.summary_cn: 与证明助手相结合的人工智能系统现在可以大规模生成形式数学，检查者可以验证的内容与数学家所重视的内容之间的差距已经成为约束约束。我们将宝贵数学的生成建模为极限中的嵌套语言生成：验证...
items.comment: 开源大模型又添新成员，Flood这次能否撼动闭源模型的地位？

items.title: Claude 3.5 Sonnet - Anthropic's Latest Model
items.title_cn: Claude 3.5十四行诗- Anthropic的最新型号
items.summary: Anthropic releases Claude 3.5 Sonnet with improved reasoning and coding capabilities.
items.summary_cn: Anthropic发布了具有改进的推理和编码功能的Claude 3.5 Sonnet。
items.comment: 模型发布热闹非凡，能不能用、好不好用，用户说了算。

items.title: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI's Cost-Effective Model
items.title_cn: GPT-4o Mini - OpenAI的成本效益模型
items.summary: OpenAI launches GPT-4o Mini, offering high performance at lower cost.
items.summary_cn: OpenAI推出GPT-4o Mini ，以更低的成本提供高性能。
items.comment: 又是一个'史上最强'，基准测试刷得飞起，实际应用场景待检验。

items.title: Gemini 1.5 Flash - Google's Fast Model
items.summary: Google releases Gemini 1.5 Flash for faster inference and lower cost.
items.summary_cn: 谷歌发布了Gemini 1.5 Flash ，以实现更快的推理和更低的成本。
items.comment: 商业模型再升级，功能看着牛，钱包要捂紧，按量付费伤不起。

items.title: AI Regulation Updates - EU AI Act Implementation
items.title_cn: 人工智能法规更新-欧盟人工智能法案实施
items.summary: European Union implements AI Act, setting global standard for AI regulation.
items.summary_cn: 欧盟实施《人工智能法案》，为人工智能监管设定全球标准。
items.comment: 行业变化快，今天的热点明天可能就凉了，理性看待。

items.title: AI Chip Market Competition Intensifies
items.title_cn: 人工智能芯片市场竞争加剧

items.comment: AI领域新动态，保持关注，别被营销号带节奏。
